emails.body: FW: Massachusetts Electric Default Customer List FTP Site Instructions Richard, Here is the phone number we need to call to get access to the list. Could you please call and see if they will give you the password? Thanks, alex Forwarded by Alex Hidalgo/HOU/EES on 10/18/2001 09:09 AM To: 'frishe@enron.com'
